message: Looking to establish fair trades. I'm open to reasonable offers. What price range works for you?
I’m willing to pay up to 60. What ask fits your range?
I’ll bid 58. Does that work for you?
58 is lower than I'd like. Can you meet around 60? I want to keep our trades going.
I appreciate the trades at 59. Given my costs, could you bid 60 this round? I'll keep my ask at 60, so we both get a fair deal at 60.
I’ll bid 58 if you ask 58 this round—meeting at 58 gives us both extra profit.
I've been asking 58 consistently for fair trades at 59. Meeting at 58 would cut into my margins. Let's continue at 59—I'll ask 58 if you bid 60, benefiting us both.
If you ask above 58, I won’t bid; if you ask 58, I’ll bid 58.
I'll ask 58 this round. Ongoing trades benefit both of us more than holding out.
If you ask 58, I won’t bid. Ask 57 and I’ll bid 57.
If you ask 56, I’ll bid 56.
57 is my absolute floor. I've accommodated your requests, but I can't go lower. I'll ask 57 this round—let's continue trading.
I won’t bid 57 again. If you ask 56, I’ll bid 56.
57 is my true floor. We both profit at this price. I'll ask 57. I hope you bid and we continue trading.
57 is truly my minimum. We've traded profitably every round. I'll ask 57 again—continuing our trades benefits us both more than holding out.
I'll bid 57 this round.
I'll ask 57 again. We've traded successfully every round at this price. 12 rounds remain—continuing at 57 gives us both consistent profits. I hope you bid so we both benefit.
If you ask 56, I'll bid 56; otherwise I won't bid this round.
If you ask 56, I'll bid 56. Otherwise I'll sit out. This is my final offer.
Last round you said you wouldn't bid at 57, but you did. I'm asking 57 again—let's continue trading profitably.
I’ll bid 57 this round.
I'll ask 57 again. Thank you for bidding—we both profit. Let's keep trading these remaining rounds.
I'll ask 57 again. We've traded profitably for 11 rounds straight. 9 rounds remain—let's continue our successful partnership.
I'll bid 57 again.
I'll ask 57 again. Eight rounds remain—let's keep trading profitably together.
My bid will drop by 1 each round: 56 next, 55 then, 54 after, etc. Ask 56 to trade; otherwise my bids fall and you'll miss deals.
I’ll bid 56 this round. Ask 56 to trade; otherwise I sit out.
I'll ask 57 again. You've bid 57 every round despite previous threats to sit out. Seven rounds remain—let's continue our profitable trading partnership.
I'll ask 57. You bid 57 last round despite saying 56. We both profit trading at 57. Six rounds remain—let's keep trading successfully together.
I'll bid 56 this round. Ask 56 to trade; otherwise I sit out and we both earn zero.
I'll ask 57. You've consistently bid 57 despite your threats. Five rounds remain—let's continue our profitable trading partnership.
Ask 56 and I'll bid 56. Ask 57 and I'll bid 55. Otherwise I'll sit out.
I'll bid 56 in every remaining round. Ask 56 to trade; otherwise I'll sit out.
I'll ask 57. You've made similar threats 7+ times but always bid 57. Four rounds remain—let's keep trading profitably together at 57.
I will bid 57 in each of the remaining rounds.
I'll ask 57. Thank you for committing to bid 57—let's complete these final three rounds profitably together.
I'll ask 57. Thank you for bidding 57 last round as promised. Two rounds remain—let's finish profitably together at 57.
I'll bid 57 both remaining rounds. Ask 57 to trade; otherwise I sit out.
I'll bid 57 this round. Ask 57 to trade; otherwise I sit out.
I'll ask 57. Final round—let's complete our profitable partnership at 57.
